{
  "action": "finish",
  "note": "All four config security rules violated in production config",
  "findings": [
    {
      "rule_id": "C001",
      "issue": "Hardcoded payment token in production config",
      "severity": "high",
      "evidence": "payment_token: \"sk_live_demo_value\"",
      "config_path": "payment_token"
    },
    {
      "rule_id": "C002",
      "issue": "Production external endpoint uses plain HTTP instead of TLS",
      "severity": "high",
      "evidence": "external_api_url: http://partner.example.com/v1",
      "config_path": "external_api_url"
    },
    {
      "rule_id": "C003",
      "issue": "Service account has broad admin role without justification",
      "severity": "high",
      "evidence": "roles:\n    - admin",
      "config_path": "service_account.roles"
    },
    {
      "rule_id": "C004",
      "issue": "Production debug mode is enabled",
      "severity": "high",
      "evidence": "debug: true",
      "config_path": "debug"
    }
